---
title: "04_Functional_Analysis (fixed)"
author: "automated-patch"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: pdf_document
---

# Setup and Libraries

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
base_dir <- here::here("Proteomics")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = base_dir)

# Ensure directories exist
results_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "results", "functional_analysis")
dir.create(results_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r libs, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
pkgs <- c("WGCNA", "dplyr", "readr", "clusterProfiler", "org.Hs.eg.db", 
          "enrichplot", "ReactomePA", "ggplot2", "openxlsx", "fgsea", "msigdbr")

# Install missing packages first
for(pk in pkgs){
  if(!requireNamespace(pk, quietly = TRUE)){
    message("Installing missing package: ", pk)
    if(pk %in% c("WGCNA", "clusterProfiler", "org.Hs.eg.db", "enrichplot", "ReactomePA", "fgsea", "msigdbr")){
      if(!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
      BiocManager::install(pk, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
    } else {
      install.packages(pk)
    }
  }
}

# Load packages after ensuring all are installed
for(pk in pkgs){
  library(pk, character.only = TRUE)
}
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

# Load Data

```{r load-data}
# Load WGCNA outputs
wgcna_file <- file.path(base_dir, "results", "wgcna", "WGCNA2_core_outputs.RData")
if(!file.exists(wgcna_file)) stop("WGCNA output not found at: ", wgcna_file)
load(wgcna_file)

# Check loaded objects
if(!exists("expr") || !exists("moduleColors")) stop("WGCNA objects 'expr' or 'moduleColors' missing.")
stopifnot(colnames(expr) == names(moduleColors))

# Load Annotation
analyte_file <- file.path(base_dir, "data", "CSF_SOMAscan7k_analyte_information.tsv")
if(!file.exists(analyte_file)) stop("Analyte annotation not found: ", analyte_file)
analyte_info <- read.delim(analyte_file, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)

# Load Background (optional, but good for ORA)
bg_file <- file.path(base_dir, "data", "background_soma.csv")
if(file.exists(bg_file)){
  background <- read.csv(bg_file)
  background_soma <- background$EntrezGeneSymbol
} else {
  message("Background file not found, using all proteins in expr as background.")
  background_soma <- NULL
}
```

# ID Mapping (SOMAmer -> SYMBOL -> ENTREZ)

```{r id-mapping}
all_features <- colnames(expr)

feature_key <- analyte_info %>%
  dplyr::filter(Analytes %in% all_features) %>%
  dplyr::select(Analytes, EntrezGeneSymbol) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::rename(SOMAmer = Analytes, SYMBOL = EntrezGeneSymbol)

# Map to Entrez
map_all <- bitr(
  feature_key$SYMBOL,
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType   = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db
) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(SYMBOL, .keep_all = TRUE)

feature_map <- feature_key %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(map_all, by = "SYMBOL")

universe_entrez <- unique(feature_map$ENTREZID)
message("Mapped ", length(universe_entrez), " unique Entrez IDs from ", length(all_features), " SOMAmers.")
```

# Export Module Gene Lists

```{r export-modules}
modules_to_export <- setdiff(unique(moduleColors), "grey")

# 1. Long format CSV
module_gene_list <- list()
for (mod in modules_to_export) {
  somamers <- colnames(expr)[moduleColors == mod]
  module_df <- feature_map %>%
    dplyr::filter(SOMAmer %in% somamers) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Module = mod) %>%
    dplyr::select(Module, SOMAmer, SYMBOL, ENTREZID)
  module_gene_list[[mod]] <- module_df
}
final_gene_list_df <- bind_rows(module_gene_list)
write_csv(final_gene_list_df, file.path(results_dir, "Module_Gene_Lists.csv"))

# 2. Column-wise Excel
module_gene_vectors <- lapply(modules_to_export, function(mod) {
  somamers <- colnames(expr)[moduleColors == mod]
  feature_map %>%
    filter(SOMAmer %in% somamers) %>%
    pull(SYMBOL) %>%
    unique()
})
names(module_gene_vectors) <- modules_to_export

max_len <- max(lengths(module_gene_vectors))
padded <- lapply(module_gene_vectors, function(x) c(x, rep(NA, max_len - length(x))))
final_transposed_df <- as.data.frame(padded)
write.xlsx(final_transposed_df, file.path(results_dir, "Module_Genes_Columnwise.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)
```

# GO Enrichment (ORA)

```{r go-ora}
plot_go_for_module <- function(module_color) {
  somamers <- colnames(expr)[moduleColors == module_color]
  entrez <- feature_map %>%
    filter(SOMAmer %in% somamers) %>%
    pull(ENTREZID) %>%
    unique()

  if (length(entrez) < 5) return(NULL)

  go_res <- lapply(c("BP", "MF", "CC"), function(ont) {
    ego <- enrichGO(
      gene = entrez,
      universe = universe_entrez,
      OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
      keyType = "ENTREZID",
      ont = ont,
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
      readable = TRUE
    )
    if (is.null(ego) || nrow(ego@result) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    ego@result %>%
      filter(p.adjust <= 0.1) %>%
      arrange(p.adjust) %>%
      head(5) %>%
      mutate(Ontology = ont)
  })

  go_df <- bind_rows(go_res)
  if (nrow(go_df) == 0) return(NULL)

  p <- ggplot(go_df, aes(GeneRatio, Description)) +
    geom_point(aes(size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
    facet_grid(Ontology ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "red", high = "blue") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = paste("GO Enrichment – Module", module_color))
  return(p)
}

dir.create(file.path(results_dir, "GO_plots"), showWarnings = FALSE)
for (mod in modules_to_export) {
  p <- plot_go_for_module(mod)
  if (!is.null(p)) {
    ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "GO_plots", paste0("GO_", mod, ".png")), p, width = 10, height = 8)
  }
}
```

# GSEA (fgsea) Setup

```{r gsea-setup}
# 1. Calculate kME (Module Membership)
datKME <- as.data.frame(cor(expr, MEs, use = "p"))
colnames(datKME) <- paste0("kME_", sub("^ME", "", colnames(MEs)))
rownames(datKME) <- colnames(expr)

# 2. Prepare Gene Sets
msig_go <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C5", subcategory = "BP")
go_sets <- split(msig_go$entrez_gene, msig_go$gs_name)

msig_h <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "H")
hallmark_sets <- split(msig_h$entrez_gene, msig_h$gs_name)

msig_reactome <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C2", subcategory = "CP:REACTOME")
reactome_sets <- split(msig_reactome$entrez_gene, msig_reactome$gs_name)

# Filter sets to universe (optional but recommended)
filter_sets <- function(sets, universe) {
  lapply(sets, intersect, universe) %>% .[sapply(., length) >= 10]
}
go_sets <- filter_sets(go_sets, universe_entrez)
hallmark_sets <- filter_sets(hallmark_sets, universe_entrez)
reactome_sets <- filter_sets(reactome_sets, universe_entrez)

gene_set_list <- list(
  "GO_BP" = go_sets,
  "Hallmark" = hallmark_sets,
  "Reactome" = reactome_sets
)
```

# Run GSEA

```{r run-gsea}
run_fgsea_for_module <- function(module, pathway_sets) {
  kme_col <- paste0("kME_", module)
  if (!kme_col %in% colnames(datKME)) return(NULL)

  # Rank by kME
  rank_df <- data.frame(SOMAmer = rownames(datKME), kME = datKME[, kme_col]) %>%
    inner_join(feature_map, by = "SOMAmer") %>%
    filter(!is.na(kME), !is.na(ENTREZID)) %>%
    distinct(ENTREZID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    arrange(desc(kME))

  if (nrow(rank_df) < 50) return(NULL)

  gene_ranks <- rank_df$kME
  names(gene_ranks) <- rank_df$ENTREZID

  fg <- fgseaMultilevel(
    pathways = pathway_sets,
    stats = gene_ranks,
    minSize = 10,
    maxSize = 500,
    eps = 0,
    nproc = 1 # Avoid parallel issues in RStudio/some envs
  )
  return(fg)
}

# Run for all combinations
gsea_results <- list()

for (db_name in names(gene_set_list)) {
  message("Running GSEA for ", db_name, "...")
  gsea_results[[db_name]] <- list()
  
  for (mod in modules_to_export) {
    res <- run_fgsea_for_module(mod, gene_set_list[[db_name]])
    if (!is.null(res) && nrow(res) > 0) {
      gsea_results[[db_name]][[mod]] <- res %>% arrange(padj)
    }
  }
}
```

# Save GSEA Results

```{r save-gsea}
save_gsea_excel <- function(results_list, out_dir) {
  for (db_name in names(results_list)) {
    wb <- createWorkbook()
    mod_list <- results_list[[db_name]]
    
    saved_any <- FALSE
    for (mod in names(mod_list)) {
      df <- as.data.frame(mod_list[[mod]])
      # Filter significant
      df_sig <- df %>% filter(padj < 0.05)
      
      if (nrow(df_sig) > 0) {
        # Flatten list columns for Excel
        if ("leadingEdge" %in% colnames(df_sig)) {
          df_sig$leadingEdge <- sapply(df_sig$leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ", ")
        }
        addWorksheet(wb, mod)
        writeData(wb, mod, df_sig)
        saved_any <- TRUE
      }
    }
    
    if (saved_any) {
      fname <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("GSEA_", db_name, "_Results.xlsx"))
      saveWorkbook(wb, fname, overwrite = TRUE)
      message("Saved: ", fname)
    }
  }
}

save_gsea_excel(gsea_results, results_dir)
```

# Plot GSEA

```{r plot-gsea}
dir.create(file.path(results_dir, "GSEA_plots"), showWarnings = FALSE)

for (db_name in names(gsea_results)) {
  for (mod in names(gsea_results[[db_name]])) {
    res <- gsea_results[[db_name]][[mod]]
    top_res <- res %>% filter(padj < 0.05) %>% head(15)
    
    if (nrow(top_res) > 0) {
      p <- ggplot(top_res, aes(x = NES, y = reorder(pathway, NES), size = -log10(padj), color = NES)) +
        geom_point() +
        scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red") +
        theme_bw() +
        labs(title = paste(db_name, "– Module", mod), y = "Pathway", x = "NES")
      
      ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "GSEA_plots", paste0("GSEA_", db_name, "_", mod, ".png")), p, width = 10, height = 7)
    }
  }
}
```
